title: out-of-line definition of 'LexerInput' does not match any declaration in 'V3LexerBase'
body:
Apple clang version 14.0.3 (clang-1403.0.22.14.1)
Target: arm64-apple-darwin22.4.0

```
In file included from ../V3ParseLex.cpp:30:
V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp:8942:18: error: out-of-line definition of 'LexerInput' does not match any declaration in 'V3LexerBase'
int yyFlexLexer::LexerInput( char* buf, int /* max_size */ )
                 ^~~~~~~~~~
V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp:8971:19: error: out-of-line definition of 'LexerOutput' does not match any declaration in 'V3LexerBase'
void yyFlexLexer::LexerOutput( const char* buf, int size )
                  ^~~~~~~~~~~
In file included from ../V3ParseLex.cpp:30:
V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp:8942:18: error: out-of-line definition of 'LexerInput' does not match any declaration in 'V3LexerBase'
int yyFlexLexer::LexerInput( char* buf, int /* max_size */ )
                 ^~~~~~~~~~
V3Lexer_pregen.yy.cpp:8971:19: error: out-of-line definition of 'LexerOutput' does not match any declaration in 'V3LexerBase'
void yyFlexLexer::LexerOutput( const char* buf, int size )
                  ^~~~~~~~~~~
2 errors generated.
```
